Operation 'createSecret' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description lacks details about input parameters, return values, and the complete lifecycle. Added information about what parameters are accepted, what is returned (secret_key and metadata_key), and clarified the destruction behavior for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Store a secret value. The secret will be encrypted and can only be retrieved once.
data.description_suggestion: Store an encrypted secret value that can only be retrieved once. Accepts the secret value and optional parameters (e.g., passphrase, expiration). Returns a secret_key for sharing and a metadata_key for checking status. After the first retrieval, the secret is automatically destroyed.
data.reasoning: Description lacks details about input parameters, return values, and the complete lifecycle. Added information about what parameters are accepted, what is returned (secret_key and metadata_key), and clarified the destruction behavior for better AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'generateSecret' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Description is vague about input parameters and return values. Added clarity about what parameters can be customized and what the operation returns, enabling AI agents to better understand when and how to use this operation.

data.current_description: Generate a short, unique secret. Useful for temporary passwords and similar.
data.description_suggestion: Generate a random, unique secret value suitable for temporary passwords and one-time credentials. Accepts optional parameters to customize length and character set. Returns the generated secret value along with secret_key and metadata_key for sharing and tracking.
data.reasoning: Description is vague about input parameters and return values. Added clarity about what parameters can be customized and what the operation returns, enabling AI agents to better understand when and how to use this operation.

message: Operation 'retrieveSecret' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description lacks input parameter details (secret_key, optional passphrase) and output details (what is returned). Added clarity about required and optional inputs, the return value, and the irreversible destruction side effect for improved AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Retrieve the secret value. This can only be done once after which the secret is destroyed.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve the encrypted secret value using the secret_key. Requires the secret_key path parameter and optionally a passphrase if one was set during creation. Returns the decrypted secret value. After successful retrieval, the secret is immediately destroyed and cannot be accessed again.
data.reasoning: Description lacks input parameter details (secret_key, optional passphrase) and output details (what is returned). Added clarity about required and optional inputs, the return value, and the irreversible destruction side effect for improved AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'getSecretMetadata' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Description lacks specific input parameter details and output information. Added clarity about the required metadata_key parameter and what metadata fields are returned, helping AI agents understand the operation's utility for status checking.

data.current_description: Retrieve metadata about a secret without retrieving the secret itself. Can be used to check if a secret has been viewed.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve metadata about a secret using the metadata_key without accessing the secret value. Requires the metadata_key path parameter. Returns metadata including creation time, expiration status, view count, and whether the secret has been retrieved. Useful for verifying secret status without consuming the single-view allowance.
data.reasoning: Description lacks specific input parameter details and output information. Added clarity about the required metadata_key parameter and what metadata fields are returned, helping AI agents understand the operation's utility for status checking.

message: Operation 'burnSecret' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description lacks input parameter details and output information. Added clarity about the required metadata_key parameter, the precondition (secret must be unread), return value, and the irreversible nature of the operation for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Burn (destroy) a secret that has not been read yet.
data.description_suggestion: Permanently destroy an unread secret using the metadata_key. Requires the metadata_key path parameter. Returns confirmation of successful destruction. This operation can only be performed on secrets that have not yet been retrieved. After burning, the secret becomes permanently inaccessible.
data.reasoning: Description lacks input parameter details and output information. Added clarity about the required metadata_key parameter, the precondition (secret must be unread), return value, and the irreversible nature of the operation for better AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'listRecentMetadata' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Description lacks details about authentication requirements, return format, and what metadata fields are included. Added clarity about authentication, the array return format, and example use cases for better AI agent understanding of when to use this operation.

data.current_description: List metadata of recently created secrets for the authenticated user.
data.description_suggestion: List metadata for recently created secrets belonging to the authenticated user. Requires HTTP Basic authentication. Returns an array of SecretMetadata objects including creation time, expiration status, view count, and retrieval status for each secret. Useful for monitoring and managing multiple secrets.
data.reasoning: Description lacks details about authentication requirements, return format, and what metadata fields are included. Added clarity about authentication, the array return format, and example use cases for better AI agent understanding of when to use this operation.
